data.body: CORRECTION: Cannot use scripts/ticket/ — plugins/dso/scripts/ticket is an existing shell script (DSO CLI dispatcher). Following figma_merge/ exemplar convention (snake_case of source file basename), use plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/ instead. Corrected acceptance criteria: test -d plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer && test -f plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/__init__.py
